response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the provided Reference JSON for 'I can't control myself' and '未来島 -Future Island-'. 2. JSON Usage: Utilized Reference JSON for song lyrics; manually transcribed the conversational segment between performers. 3. Timing & Pacing: Applied aggressive end-time truncation for rapid singing segments to prevent cascading delays, particularly in 'Future Island'. Included visual text for the second song title.

subtitles.original: 記憶繋げないまま...
subtitles.english: Without being able to connect my memories...

subtitles.original: 狂って壊れてしまうよ
subtitles.english: I'll go mad and break apart

subtitles.original: もう何度も繰り返した
subtitles.english: I've already repeated it so many times

subtitles.original: 神様に願いをかけて
subtitles.english: Making a wish to God

subtitles.original: 何度も繰り返した
subtitles.english: I've repeated it so many times

subtitles.original: 世界 世界 開くのを待っている
subtitles.english: Waiting for the world, the world to open

subtitles.original: もうなんにも いらないから
subtitles.english: Because I don't need anything anymore

subtitles.original: 零れた想いは幻
subtitles.english: The spilled feelings are an illusion

subtitles.original: 何度も繰り返した
subtitles.english: I've repeated it so many times

subtitles.original: 世界 世界 開くのを...
subtitles.english: The world, the world, to open...

subtitles.original: もう何度も繰り返した
subtitles.english: I've already repeated it so many times

subtitles.original: 神様に願いをかけて
subtitles.english: Making a wish to God

subtitles.original: 何度も繰り返して
subtitles.english: Repeating it so many times

subtitles.original: 世界 世界 開くのを待っている
subtitles.english: Waiting for the world, the world to open

subtitles.original: イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: 最初のゲストはAZKi先輩です！
subtitles.english: Our first guest is AZKi-senpai!

subtitles.original: AZKi！右手にマイク、左手に地図
subtitles.english: AZKi! Mic in the right hand, map in the left hand

subtitles.original: あなたのハートにゼロゲッサー、カリオペちゃん、ハッピーバースデー！
subtitles.english: Zero-guessing your heart, Calliope-chan, Happy Birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！Birthdayです、誕生日です
subtitles.english: Thank you very much! It's my birthday, my birthday

subtitles.original: 誕生日カル！ありがとうございます
subtitles.english: Birthday Call! Thank you very much

subtitles.original: え、さっき一緒に歌った曲、大好きです
subtitles.english: Yeah, I love the song we just sang together

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます。なんと、AZKiのオリジナル曲を一緒に歌わせていただきました
subtitles.english: Thank you very much. We actually got to sing AZKi's original song together

subtitles.original: そうですよね。ずっとバンドアレンジ聴きたかったから、選びました
subtitles.english: That's right. I've always wanted to hear it in a band arrangement, so I chose it

subtitles.original: めっちゃ熱かったです！
subtitles.english: It was so hot!

subtitles.original: やった！楽しかったよね
subtitles.english: Yay! It was fun, wasn't it?

subtitles.original: バンドの演奏もすごかったです
subtitles.english: The band's performance was also amazing

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます。イェイ！あ、ちなみに...
subtitles.english: Thank you very much. Yay! Oh, by the way...

subtitles.original: ステージと見てほしい
subtitles.english: I want you to look at the stage

subtitles.original: いや、すごい！めちゃくちゃぴかぴか光ってる！
subtitles.english: Whoa, incredible! It's shining so brightly!

subtitles.original: ぴかぴかストーン！
subtitles.english: Shiny stones!

subtitles.original: ぴかぴかストーン！
subtitles.english: Shiny stones!

subtitles.original: そうだよね。素敵ですよね
subtitles.english: That's right. It's lovely, isn't it?

subtitles.original: 素敵なステージです
subtitles.english: It's a lovely stage

subtitles.original: ちなみに...
subtitles.english: By the way...

subtitles.original: AZKi先輩の...
subtitles.english: AZKi-senpai's...

subtitles.original: 誕生石は知ってる？
subtitles.english: Do you know your birthstone?

subtitles.original: AZKiの誕生石は... ま、7月なんですけど...
subtitles.english: AZKi's birthstone is... well, I was born in July...

subtitles.original: ルビー！ルビー、この色！
subtitles.english: Ruby! Ruby, this color!

subtitles.original: そう、なりました！すごい！
subtitles.english: Yes, it turned [ruby]! Amazing!

subtitles.original: こっち色がかわるんですね今日は
subtitles.english: The color changes today, doesn't it?

subtitles.original: すごい、めちゃ赤です
subtitles.english: Amazing, it's very red

subtitles.original: そうですね。きれい
subtitles.english: That's right. Beautiful

subtitles.original: すごくきれいから、一緒になんか、あの写真撮りたいと思い
subtitles.english: It's so beautiful, I'd like to take a photo together

subtitles.original: 撮りたい、撮りたい！せっかく！
subtitles.english: I want to, I want to! Since we're here!

subtitles.original: Take screenshots!
subtitles.english: Take screenshots!

subtitles.original: Screenshot!
subtitles.english: Screenshot!

subtitles.original: いい感じです！
subtitles.english: Looking good!

subtitles.original: イェイ！ありがとうございます
subtitles.english: Yay! Thank you very much

subtitles.original: じゃ、ま、生ライブだからやっぱり水飲みたいと思います
subtitles.english: Well, since it's a live show, I really want to drink some water

subtitles.original: 水は飲もう！
subtitles.english: Let's drink water!

subtitles.original: 水乾杯です！はい、乾杯！
subtitles.english: A water toast! Yes, cheers!

subtitles.original: Cheers!
subtitles.english: Cheers!

subtitles.original: Okay, okay. やった！次の曲...
subtitles.english: Okay, okay. Yay! The next song...

subtitles.original: お、次の曲はなんだろうな？
subtitles.english: Oh, what's the next song?

subtitles.original: もう一曲ありますよね一緒に
subtitles.english: We have one more song together, right?

subtitles.original: あります！そう、そうですね。さっきAZKi先輩のオリ曲歌いましたね
subtitles.english: We do! Yes, that's right. Earlier we sang AZKi-senpai's original song

subtitles.original: 今回はカリオペのオリ曲です。歌わせていただきます
subtitles.english: This time it's Calliope's original song. We'll be singing it

subtitles.original: The next song is Calliope's original, "Future Island"!
subtitles.english: The next song is Calliope's original, "Future Island"!

subtitles.original: 未来島 -Future Island-
subtitles.english: [Title: Future Island]

subtitles.original: 危険な海に浮かぶ島エッグヘッド
subtitles.english: Dangerous sea, floating island, Egghead

subtitles.original: 世界変える未来島のラボフェーズ
subtitles.english: Changing the world, Future Island's lab phase

subtitles.original: 最高の頭脳叶えるよ願望
subtitles.english: Best brain, wishes will come true

subtitles.original: 未来のお宝さがしちゃお
subtitles.english: Let's search for future treasure

subtitles.original: 天才が引き起こす発想の奇跡
subtitles.english: Genius causes a miracle of ideas

subtitles.original: 脳内で終わらせない夢のファンタジー
subtitles.english: A fantasy of dreams that won't end in the brain

subtitles.original: 世界がひっくり返るテクノロジー
subtitles.english: Technology that turns the world upside down

subtitles.original: 大体叶えちゃうラボラトリー
subtitles.english: A laboratory that grants almost anything

subtitles.original: 正(シャカ) 悪(リリス) 想(エジソン) 知(ピタゴラス) 暴(アトラス) 欲(ヨーク)
subtitles.english: Shaka, Lilith, Edison, Pythagoras, Atlas, York,

subtitles.original: 6人のサテライト
subtitles.english: 6 satellites

subtitles.original: 湧きだすアイディア止まらない
subtitles.english: Ideas gushing out, can't stop

subtitles.original: 忙しすぎて猫の手も借りたい
subtitles.english: Too busy, wish for a cat's hand

subtitles.original: 海も波も超えてゆく海賊王
subtitles.english: Exceeding the sea and waves, Pirate King

subtitles.original: 常識変えてゆく発明王
subtitles.english: Changing common sense, Invention King

subtitles.original: そんな奴らに憧れてきた
subtitles.english: I've been longing for those guys

subtitles.original: 次は誰が王になる？
subtitles.english: Who will be king next?

subtitles.original: 無限の夢 未来の知恵 ひらめきを巻き起こせエッグヘッド
subtitles.english: Infinite dreams, future wisdom, stir up the flash, Egghead

subtitles.original: 無限の夢 未来の知恵 過去も世界も飛び越して
subtitles.english: Infinite dreams, future wisdom, jump over the past and the world

subtitles.original: ベガパンク生み出すよアイディア
subtitles.english: Vegapunk, producing ideas

subtitles.original: ベガパンク ベガパンク...
subtitles.english: Vegapunk, Vegapunk...
